parameters.query:
select c.phone, c.language, p.name_en, p.slug, w.customer_id, w.product_id
from wishlist w
join customers c on c.id = w.customer_id
join products p on p.id = w.product_id
where w.notify_restock and p.stock > 0 and c.whatsapp_opt_in

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ apiKey: $env.AISENSY_API_KEY, campaignName: $json.templateName, destination: $json.phone, userName: 'Rasi Mom & Baby', templateParams: $json.params }) }}

parameters.query: update wishlist set notify_restock = false where customer_id = '{{ $json.customer_id }}' and product_id = '{{ $json.product_id }}'
